Collects and updates various system and application analytics data for the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The code defines a function [`analytics_external_update`](<#analytics_external_update>) that collects various analytics data related to system performance and configuration. This function is part of a broader analytics system, as indicated by the inclusion of headers `bluetooth/analytics.h` and `services/common/analytics/analytics_external.h`. The function calls a series of other functions, each responsible for collecting specific types of data, such as battery status, CPU statistics, flash memory usage, Bluetooth pairing information, and system settings. These functions are likely defined in the included headers or their associated source files.

The function [`analytics_external_update`](<#analytics_external_update>) serves as a centralized point for gathering a wide range of analytics data, which can be used for monitoring and diagnostics purposes. It includes conditional compilation for platform-specific data collection, as seen with the `PLATFORM_SPALDING` preprocessor directive, which suggests that the function can adapt to different hardware configurations. This function does not define public APIs or external interfaces directly but rather acts as an internal mechanism to aggregate data from various system components.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `bluetooth/analytics.h`
- `services/common/analytics/analytics_external.h`


# Functions

---
### analytics\_external\_update<!-- {{#callable:analytics_external_update}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/analytics/analytics_external.c#L20>)

Collects various system and application analytics data by calling multiple data collection functions.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_battery`](<../../common/battery/battery_state.c.md#analytics_external_collect_battery>) to collect battery data.
    - Calls `analytics_external_collect_accel_xyz_delta` to collect accelerometer data.
    - Calls `analytics_external_collect_app_cpu_stats` to collect application CPU statistics.
    - Calls `analytics_external_collect_app_flash_read_stats` to collect application flash read statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_cpu_stats`](<../../../freertos_application.c.md#analytics_external_collect_cpu_stats>) to collect CPU statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_stop_inhibitor_stats`](<../../../kernel/util/stop.c.md#analytics_external_collect_stop_inhibitor_stats>) with `rtc_get_ticks()` to collect stop inhibitor statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_chip_specific_parameters`](<../../../comm/bluetooth_analytics.c.md#analytics_external_collect_chip_specific_parameters>) to collect chip-specific parameters.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_bt_pairing_info`](<../bluetooth/bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md#analytics_external_collect_bt_pairing_info>) to collect Bluetooth pairing information.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_ble_parameters`](<../../../comm/bluetooth_analytics.c.md#analytics_external_collect_ble_parameters>) to collect BLE parameters.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_ble_pairing_info`](<../bluetooth/bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md#analytics_external_collect_ble_pairing_info>) to collect BLE pairing information.
    - Calls `analytics_external_collect_system_flash_statistics` to collect system flash statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_backlight_settings`](<../../common/light.c.md#analytics_external_collect_backlight_settings>) to collect backlight settings.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_notification_settings`](<../../../apps/system_apps/settings/settings_notifications.c.md#analytics_external_collect_notification_settings>) to collect notification settings.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_system_theme_settings`](<../../../shell/system_theme.c.md#analytics_external_collect_system_theme_settings>) to collect system theme settings.
    - Calls `analytics_external_collect_ancs_info` to collect ANCS information.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_dls_stats`](<../data_logging/dls_storage.c.md#analytics_external_collect_dls_stats>) to collect DLS statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_i2c_stats`](<../../../drivers/i2c.c.md#analytics_external_collect_i2c_stats>) to collect I2C statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_stack_free`](<../../../kernel/pebble_tasks.c.md#analytics_external_collect_stack_free>) to collect stack free information.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_alerts_preferences`](<../notifications/alerts_preferences.c.md#analytics_external_collect_alerts_preferences>) to collect alerts preferences.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_timeline_pin_stats`](<../timeline/timeline.c.md#analytics_external_collect_timeline_pin_stats>) to collect timeline pin statistics.
    - Conditionally calls [`analytics_external_collect_display_offset`](<../../../drivers/display/ice40lp/ice40lp.c.md#analytics_external_collect_display_offset>) if `PLATFORM_SPALDING` is defined to collect display offset.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_pfs_stats`](<../filesystem/pfs.c.md#analytics_external_collect_pfs_stats>) to collect PFS statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_bt_chip_heartbeat`](<../../../comm/bluetooth_analytics.c.md#analytics_external_collect_bt_chip_heartbeat>) to collect Bluetooth chip heartbeat.
    - Calls `analytics_external_collect_kernel_heap_stats` to collect kernel heap statistics.
    - Calls [`analytics_external_collect_accel_samples_received`](<../../common/accel_manager.c.md#analytics_external_collect_accel_samples_received>) to collect accelerometer samples received.
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`analytics_external_collect_battery`](<../../common/battery/battery_state.c.md#analytics_external_collect_battery>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_cpu_stats`](<../../../freertos_application.c.md#analytics_external_collect_cpu_stats>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_stop_inhibitor_stats`](<../../../kernel/util/stop.c.md#analytics_external_collect_stop_inhibitor_stats>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_chip_specific_parameters`](<../../../comm/bluetooth_analytics.c.md#analytics_external_collect_chip_specific_parameters>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_bt_pairing_info`](<../bluetooth/bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md#analytics_external_collect_bt_pairing_info>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_ble_parameters`](<../../../comm/bluetooth_analytics.c.md#analytics_external_collect_ble_parameters>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_ble_pairing_info`](<../bluetooth/bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md#analytics_external_collect_ble_pairing_info>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_backlight_settings`](<../../common/light.c.md#analytics_external_collect_backlight_settings>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_notification_settings`](<../../../apps/system_apps/settings/settings_notifications.c.md#analytics_external_collect_notification_settings>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_system_theme_settings`](<../../../shell/system_theme.c.md#analytics_external_collect_system_theme_settings>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_dls_stats`](<../data_logging/dls_storage.c.md#analytics_external_collect_dls_stats>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_i2c_stats`](<../../../drivers/i2c.c.md#analytics_external_collect_i2c_stats>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_stack_free`](<../../../kernel/pebble_tasks.c.md#analytics_external_collect_stack_free>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_alerts_preferences`](<../notifications/alerts_preferences.c.md#analytics_external_collect_alerts_preferences>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_timeline_pin_stats`](<../timeline/timeline.c.md#analytics_external_collect_timeline_pin_stats>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_display_offset`](<../../../drivers/display/ice40lp/ice40lp.c.md#analytics_external_collect_display_offset>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_pfs_stats`](<../filesystem/pfs.c.md#analytics_external_collect_pfs_stats>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_bt_chip_heartbeat`](<../../../comm/bluetooth_analytics.c.md#analytics_external_collect_bt_chip_heartbeat>)
    - [`analytics_external_collect_accel_samples_received`](<../../common/accel_manager.c.md#analytics_external_collect_accel_samples_received>)
